records.title: Relebohile Mofokeng proves he's made for the main stage in Bafana's big win
records.description: If there were still doubts regarding whether or not Relebohile Mofokeng is ready to play in one of the world's top 10 leagues, he effectively put them to bed as Bafana Bafana stunned South Korea 1-0.

records.title: Aguirre's pragmatic Mexico has its doubters, but it is built for World Cup success
records.description: Don't let the 3-0 scoreline fool you -- Mexico's win over Czechia was as pragmatic as they come, which is just how head coach Javier Aguirre had planned it.
